title: 24cm Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Non Stick Frying Pan with Lid, Induction Pan for Even Heat Cooking, Heat-Resistant Handle, Suitable for All Hobs
features: Advanced Hybrid Non-Stick Technology – Metal Utensil Safe, featuring precision laser-etched hybrid non-stick coating, this frying pan offers exceptional scratch resistance and is safe to use with metal utensils. Enjoy healthier cooking with less oil—food releases smoothly and prevents sticking, ideal for everyday meals.

Fast & Even Heating – Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Construction, built with a tri-ply stainless steel + aluminium core, heat spreads quickly and evenly across the entire cooking surface, eliminating hot spots. Perfect for searing, sautéing, simmering, frying and finishing dishes with professional results.

Premium Food-Grade Stainless Steel – Durable & Versatile, crafted from high-quality 18/10 stainless steel for durability and long-lasting performance. Suitable for cooking steak, eggs, vegetables, stir-fries, pancakes, pasta and more, delivering consistent results from breakfast to dinner.

Compatible with All Hobs – Induction Ready, designed for all cooktops, including induction, gas, electric, ceramic and halogen hobs. The reinforced base ensures excellent heat stability, warp-resistance and reliable performance—making it a dependable kitchen essential.

Easy to Clean – Long-Lasting Non-Stick, PFOA-Free, the hybrid non-stick surface ensures effortless cleaning—simply rinse with warm water. Highly resistant to stubborn residue and built to last. PFOA-free, PFOS-free, and recommended for hand-washing to extend lifespan.
